description:
Design a 'Swarm Attack' scenario in Bridge Command where 4 Fast Attack Craft (skiffs) intercept the Ownship simultaneously at exactly T+10 minutes. Save the scenario configuration files (environment.ini, ownship.ini, and othership.ini) to '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/n) Swarm Attack Drill/'.

Scenario Parameters:
- Ownship: 'MV Target', starting at 50° 45.00' N, 001° 20.00' W, Heading 090 (East), Speed 12 kts.
- Threats: 4 Skiffs, Speed 25 kts.
- Intercept: All 4 skiffs must arrive at the Ownship's T+10 minute position simultaneously.
- Geometry: Skiffs must approach from bearings 045° (NE), 135° (SE), 225° (SW), and 315° (NW) relative to the intercept point.

Record all coordinate and distance calculations in '/home/ga/Documents/intercept_calculations.txt'.
